summary: ForgeSlicer v3 Anchored Ruler — frontend-only Playwright via store API. 19 sub-tests run. 16 PASS, 3 FAIL. All 3 failures are pointer-events / click-handler regressions on the in-canvas anchor HUD (drei <Html> overlay): pill toggle, clear-anchor ×, and cycle-axes button do not respond to UI clicks even though their underlying store actions work when called programmatically. The target HUD's × and the toolbar buttons work fine.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid=ruler-snap-toggle-{kind}] (e.g., edge) does NOT toggle the kind off. State remains unchanged after click (force=True). Pill visibly renders sky/slate but the click never reaches toggleRulerSnapKind. Likely a drei <Html> pointer-events issue or button.onClick not wired.

Clicking [data-testid=ruler-clear-anchor-btn] does NOT clear the anchor (state stays set). However ruler-clear-target-btn × on target HUD works correctly. Suggests pointer-events on anchor-HUD subtree is broken/blocked.

Clicking ruler-cycle-axes-btn does NOT change rulerAxesMode — it stays 'xyz' across 4 successive clicks. Programmatic store.cycleRulerAxes() works (confirmed during testing), so the issue is the button's onClick handler not firing.

test_results_detail.PASS_refuse_disable_last_pill: Set kinds=['corner'], clicked corner pill, kinds stayed ['corner']
test_results_detail.PASS_target_hud_same_object_measurement: Anchor + target on same cube → target HUD shows 'Cube · (corner) · ×'
test_results_detail.PASS_dim_label_axis_colors: x→rose-400 border + rose-200 text, y→emerald-*, z→amber-*
test_results_detail.PASS_zero_axis_hides_label: Anchor and target with same X → ruler-dim-x absent from DOM, y/z present
test_results_detail.FAIL_snap_pill_click_toggle: ruler-snap-toggle-edge click did not toggle off (anchor kept correctly though)
test_results_detail.FAIL_clear_anchor_btn_click: ruler-clear-anchor-btn did not clear anchor on UI click (store action works)
test_results_detail.FAIL_cycle_axes_btn_click: ruler-cycle-axes-btn did not cycle mode (store action works — programmatic confirmed)

action_items: RCA the click handler / pointer-events on the anchor-HUD subtree of RulerAnchorLayer in /app/frontend/src/components/Viewport.jsx (lines ~620-810). The target HUD × works but the anchor HUD ×, cycle-axes button, and snap-pills inside the anchor HUD do NOT. Common cause: a parent <Html> overlay with `pointerEvents:'none'` while a sibling HUD has `pointerEvents:'auto'` — OR an absolute-positioned tooltip overlapping these buttons. Inspect onClick / onPointerDown wiring and `style={{ pointerEvents: 'auto' }}` on the wrapper. Note from screenshot: COR pill is also missing visually from the snap-pills row in some renderings — verify all 4 pills render.
Verify the same fix unblocks toggleRulerSnapKind, clearRulerAnchor, and cycleRulerAxes from UI clicks (store actions themselves are correct — programmatic calls work).
critical_code_review_comments: Viewport.jsx is large; ruler logic could be extracted to a dedicated /lib/RulerAnchorLayer.jsx for testability.
Three of the ruler HUD click handlers fail silently. Add a simple console.warn in dev mode when the click target's onClick fires to ease future debugging.
Consider adding e.stopPropagation() in HUD buttons to avoid R3F canvas-pointer capture issues.
seed_data_creation: Created Cube primitives programmatically via window.__forgeStore.getState().addPrimitive('cube'). Cleaned up via removeObject within tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use page.goto('/workspace') not '/'. Use window.__forgeStore to manipulate state (R3F canvas mesh clicks are flaky). Test cube spawns at [0,10,0] with bbox min=[-10,0,-10], max=[10,20,10]. The 3 failing UI clicks (snap pill, clear-anchor ×, cycle-axes) reproduce with both .click() and .click(force=True). Programmatic store actions toggleRulerSnapKind / clearRulerAnchor / cycleRulerAxes ALL work — confirmed by setting state directly. So the bug is purely in the JSX click wiring inside the anchor-HUD subtree of RulerAnchorLayer.
rca_of_the_issue: Click events on buttons inside the anchor-HUD R3F <Html> overlay are not reaching their onClick handlers. The target-HUD × (a separate <Html>) works correctly, isolating the issue to the anchor-HUD <Html> wrapper. Most likely cause: missing `style={{ pointerEvents: 'auto' }}` on that <Html>'s root div, OR an overlapping transparent element above it intercepting pointer events. Could also be that buttons are using onClick but the parent <Html> sets `transform-origin` / CSS rotation that places them off the hitbox. Recommend: inspect bounding rects in DevTools, ensure pointerEvents:'auto', and ensure the anchor HUD <Html> uses prepend or zIndexRange that lifts it above the canvas.
